title: Exploring Regulations
description: Browse the corpus by country, regulator and topic, read original and translated sources, and search with Iris.

steps.caption: Browse the global corpus
steps.narration: Vantage tracks over eleven thousand regulations from regulators worldwide. Browse the whole corpus by country — every tile is a jurisdiction, showing how many regulations it covers.

steps.caption: Open a regulation to read it
steps.narration: Click any regulation to open it, and Vantage extracts the full text into clean, readable articles.

steps.caption: Browse by regulator
steps.narration: You can also browse by regulator — Vantage organises publishers by region: North America, Europe, the Gulf, and international bodies.

steps.caption: Open a regulator — SASO
steps.narration: Open a regulator, like Saudi Standards, to see every technical regulation it publishes.

steps.caption: Original + English translation
steps.narration: Switch to the Original tab for the publisher's own source — here, the Arabic PDF — which Vantage automatically translates to English, in place.

steps.caption: Explore by topic
steps.narration: Every regulation is tagged by topic, so you can follow exactly the themes that matter to your operations.

steps.caption: Open a topic — Energy
steps.narration: Open a topic like Energy to see all the related regulations, across every jurisdiction, in one place.

steps.caption: Search with Iris
steps.narration: The Search page combines keyword search with Iris, our AI assistant, in one box — type a question, like methane emission reduction in oil and gas.

steps.caption: A cited answer
steps.narration: Iris reads the corpus and writes a grounded answer, with every claim cited to its source, and the most relevant regulations ranked below.

steps.caption: Save the search
steps.narration: Save any search to revisit later, or to be alerted when new regulations match.
